mapper.select:
SELECT r.content AS reviewContent, r.user_account_id AS userAccountId, v.trainer_account_id AS trainerAccountId, v.trainer_nickname AS trainerNickname, v.trainer_handle AS trainerHandle, v.trainer_profile_image_url AS trainerProfileUrl, v.trainer_hati_code AS trainerHatiCode, t.training_count AS trainingCount, COALESCE(r.updated_at, r.created_at) AS reviewDate,
CASE WHEN r.updated_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS updateReview
FROM trainers_reviews r
JOIN ( SELECT user_account_id, trainer_account_id, SUM(total_count_snapshot - remaining_count) AS training_count FROM vw_user_pass GROUP BY user_account_id, trainer_account_id ) t ON r.user_account_id = t.user_account_id AND r.trainer_account_id = t.trainer_account_id
JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT user_account_id, trainer_account_id, trainer_nickname, trainer_handle, trainer_profile_image_url, trainer_hati_code FROM vw_user_pass ) v ON r.user_account_id = v.user_account_id AND r.trainer_account_id = v.trainer_account_id
WHERE r.user_account_id = #{accountId} ORDER BY COALESCE(r.updated_at, r.created_at) DESC

SELECT r.content AS reviewContent, r.trainer_account_id AS trainerAccountId, v.user_account_id AS userAccountId, v.user_nickname AS userNickname, v.user_handle AS userHandle, v.user_profile_image_url AS userProfileUrl, v.user_hati_code AS userHatiCode, t.training_count AS trainingCount, COALESCE(r.updated_at, r.created_at) AS reviewDate,
CASE WHEN r.updated_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS updateReview
FROM trainers_reviews r
JOIN ( SELECT user_account_id, trainer_account_id, SUM(total_count_snapshot - remaining_count) AS training_count FROM vw_user_pass GROUP BY user_account_id, trainer_account_id ) t ON r.user_account_id = t.user_account_id AND r.trainer_account_id = t.trainer_account_id
JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT trainer_account_id, user_account_id, user_nickname, user_handle, user_profile_image_url, user_hati_code FROM vw_user_pass ) v ON r.user_account_id = v.user_account_id AND r.trainer_account_id = v.trainer_account_id
WHERE r.trainer_account_id = #{accountId} ORDER BY COALESCE(r.updated_at, r.created_at) DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trainers_reviews (user_account_id, trainer_account_id, content) VALUES (#{userAccountId}, #{trainerAccountId}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE trainers_reviews SET content=#{content} WHERE user_account_id=#{userAccountId} AND trainer_account_id=#{trainerAccountId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM trainers_reviews WHERE user_account_id=#{userAccountId} AND trainer_account_id=#{trainerAccountId}
